metadata.description: Orderbook forensics for Binance perpetual futures — 8 manipulation fingerprints trained on 793 real pump/dump cases.

plugins.name: pumptracer
plugins.description: Orderbook forensics skill for Binance USDT perpetual futures. Replays historical depth data into K-line + 1% cumulative depth charts + manipulation narrative. 8 fingerprint detectors (bid_wall_pull, flash_dump, distribution_wall, lopsided_book, pump_continuation, breakout, rapid_pump_distribution) trained on 793 real cases.
